title: 12" Congratulations Assorted Colour Pack of 10, Latex Balloons Mixed Colours Congratulations Party Decoration
features: Versatile: Pack of 10 high-quality latex balloons for decorating any occasion.
Expandable: Can be inflated to approximately 30.5 cm when fully blown up.
Multipurpose: Ideal for birthdays, parties, celebrations, and other festive events.
Durable Material: Constructed from 100% brand-new latex for long-lasting use.
Decorative Appeal: Useful for adding vibrant colours and festive flair to any space.
description: Product description Bring a touch of festivity to any occasion with this pack of 10 high-quality latex balloons. These versatile balloons are ideal for decorating birthdays, parties, celebrations, and other activities. Crafted from durable latex material, they can be inflated to approximately 30 cm (12 inches) in diameter, creating a vibrant and colourful atmosphere. Whether you're planning a grand event or a small gathering, these balloons are a must-have for adding a playful and joyous touch. Lightweight and easy to inflate, they are perfect for both indoor and outdoor use. Unleash your creativity and let these balloons bring smiles to everyone's faces. Please note that proper precautions should be taken when using latex products, especially around individuals with latex allergies. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years. For use under adult supervision
